channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Muay Thai venues
channel.description: Latest muay thai venues in the Pattaya Gym Directory.

item.title: ALFA BJJ Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya’s first ever dedicated Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu gym. Standalone BJJ academy with Gi + No-Gi classes, all levels welcome. Pure-BJJ environment distinct from multi-discipline MMA gyms.

item.title: Sanit Sport Club
item.description: Two-zone Mabprachan club: comprehensive fitness centre + dedicated Muay Thai gym. 1,000+ members. Trainer Kru Rung — 40 years Lumpinee/Rajadamnern. Resident MAX Muay Thai champion Krasuk. 4 daily MT sessions.

item.title: Lumpinee Boxing Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
item.description: World most prestigious Muay Thai stadium. ONE Lumpinee weekly Friday cards (12 bouts) + Fairtex Fight Saturday morning. Day-trip from Pattaya for serious MT students. Tickets ฿1500-4500.

item.title: Rajadamnern Stadium (Bangkok day-trip)
item.description: World first Muay Thai stadium, founded 1945. Almost nightly fight cards. RWS Rajadamnern World Series Saturday flagship (8 fights + free beers). Tickets ฿1,600-4,500. Pair with Lumpinee for canonical Bangkok MT weekend.

item.title: MAX Muay Thai Stadium Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya daily Muay Thai stadium near King Power on Sukhumvit Road. Tourist-friendly live fight cards, online ticketing, and current listings that vary between 19:00 and 19:45 starts by date.

item.title: Fairtex Training Center Pattaya
item.description: World's largest Muay Thai resort camp. 9 rings, 17 trainers, on-site hotel & 25m pool. Champions: Yodsanklai, Stamp, Smilla Sundell, Saemapetch.

item.title: Sityodtong Pattaya
item.description: Founded 1960 by Kru Yodtong. 57+ world champions including Samart Payakaroon. Trained Rob Kaman & Ramon Dekkers. Pilgrimage destination.

item.title: WKO Muay Thai & Fitness (ISS Gym)
item.description: Owner Sifu McInnes was first Westerner to ref Lumpinee (1993). Resident trainer Sakmongkol (231-20-4, 3x Lumpinee, 5x WMC). ~฿4,000/month.

item.title: Kombat Group Thailand
item.description: All-inclusive multi-discipline camp. Christian Daghio's legacy (190 MT fights, 7x World Champ). Muay Thai+Boxing+MMA+BJJ+Krav. 6 rings. 5/5 TripAdvisor.

item.title: Battle Conquer Gym Pattaya
item.description: Pattaya's only fully air-conditioned Muay Thai gym. Weight room, sauna, ice plunge. 7-day flexible scheduling, English-speaking trainers.

item.title: Sor Klinmee Muay Thai Gym
item.description: Family-run authentic Thai camp, founded 2009 by Mit Klinmee. Home of Sudsakorn Sor Klinmee (278W/330F). Drop-ins ~฿200-300.

item.title: Petchrungruang Gym
item.description: Pattaya's 2nd-oldest gym (1986). Three generations of family. Head coach Khru Nu (Lumpinee 2nd-place, 90 fights). Home of Sylvie von Duuglas-Ittu (270+ fights).

item.title: Rambaa Somdet M16 Muay Thai & MMA
item.description: Personal camp of Rambaa M16 — Thailand's first MMA world champion (Shooto Flyweight 2009) + Muay Thai legend. Cage on site. 100m from Sor Klinmee.

item.title: Venum Training Camp Pattaya
item.description: Modern multi-discipline facility near Jomtien. Muay Thai, MMA, BJJ, Combat Fitness, S&C, kids program. 2 rings + cage/mat zone.

item.title: Rage Fight Academy
item.description: Multi-discipline academy: Muay Thai, Boxing, BJJ, MMA, Cross Training. 3 rings + BJJ/MMA mats. Education Visa sponsor for long-stays.

item.title: Silk Muay Thai
item.description: Premium boutique camp. 4.9/5 rated. All-inclusive packages from ฿25,500/month with private room + pool/sauna/spa + meals.

item.title: Pattaya Thai Boxing & Fitness Gym (Jomtien)
item.description: Walk-in budget gym in Jomtien. ~฿300 for equipment + 4-5 rounds of pads. Pro fighter Champ on roster. Air fans, no AC.

item.title: FIGHT EVO360
item.description: Combines traditional Muay Thai and boxing values with structured sports science and performance-based programming. Stub — needs deep research.

item.title: Sitpholek Muay Thai Gym
item.description: Pattaya Muay Thai camp mentioned in 2025 best-of lists. Stub — needs deep research.

item.title: Cho Nateetong Thai Boxing Camp
item.description: Authentic budget Pattaya Muay Thai camp. ~฿270 per session. Combined weight gym + dedicated Muay Thai area. Patient trainers with good pad time.

item.title: Pattaya Boxing World Stadium
item.description: Pattaya secondary Muay Thai fight stadium. Wed + Fri 20:00 real fights. Frank Sitpholek promoted. Multi-tier matchups (kids through pros). More authentic vs MAX.
